title: Balls o' Endermen
description: This pack turns enderpeals onto Balls o'Enderman 🥜
body:
# Balls o' Endermen 🟣  

**Description:**  
This resource pack renames **Ender Pearls** to **"Balls o' Endermen"** and gives them a matching custom texture!  

**Note:**  
The name change only works when playing Minecraft in one of the **English languages** (like `en_us`, `en_gb`, etc.).  

**Pack Details:**  
- Custom Ender Pearl texture and name 
- Light and fun cosmetic pack

[☕ Support Me!](https://buymeacoffee.com/mushbroom)
